prompt: A young East Asian woman with long, wavy dark brown hair and curtain bangs, wearing an elegant strapless black midi dress. She is playfully blowing a kiss toward the camera with her eyes closed, one hand extended in front of her. She has a tiny beauty mark on her left cheek and is wearing subtle jewelry. She is standing in front of a large, framed piece of modern art featuring massive red lipstick kiss marks and the handwritten text "I love you, xoxo". The setting is an upscale indoor space with warm, moody lighting and rich wood-paneled walls.
